notes: The only desktop printer line purpose-built for sublimation (vs converted inkjets). SubliJet-UHD inks. Machines built on a Ricoh engine platform.
SureColor F-series dye-sub uses UltraChrome DS ink and PrecisionCore MicroTFP heads. Transfer-paper workflow. F6470 (4-colour) / F6470H (6-colour) share a platform.
Texart RT-640 does both transfer-paper AND direct-to-fabric. Texart SBL3 low-VOC sublimation ink, gold-plated anti-static piezo head.
TS330-1600 is a high-volume transfer sublimation printer. Sb411/Sb410 water-based dye-sub inks, MWDT dot technology, ECO PASSPORT certified.
P5 TEX iSUB: industrial 3.3m press with inline sublimation fixation (iSUB) - direct-to-fabric in one step, no separate calender, but can also do transfer paper. Sublifix ink.
